name: context-keeper
description: context-keeper — cross-session memory for Claude Code. Recall ranked, token-budgeted context from every past session (recall, list_sessions, list_projects MCP tools), with an optional auto-recall hook and a local mind-map UI of your projects, topics, and sessions. Local-first: your transcripts are indexed on your machine by a local embedding model; nothing is uploaded. Requires the free context-keeper daemon (cargo install or repo build).
